data.title: FUJIFILM North America Corporation Announces U.S. Availability of FUJIFILM LTO Ultrium Generation 10 40TB Data Cartridges
data.description: In Valhalla, New York, FUJIFILM North America Corporation's Data Storage Solutions division has launched the FUJIFILM LTO Ultrium 10 Data Cartridge in the United States. This new cartridge offers a storage capacity of 40TB, marking the highest capacity in the LTO Ultrium tape media line. The FUJIFILM LTO-10 40TB cartridge aims to provide next-generation scalability, resilience against cybercrime, and cost-effective storage solutions for organizations dealing with rapid data expansion. This product is built on Fujifilm's advanced technology.

data.title: Pathway2Careers Selected to Develop Innovative Career-Connected Learning Courses for Schools
data.description: Located in Maryville, Tennessee, on April 2, 2026, Pathway2Careers (P2C), a prominent organization specializing in Career-Connected Learning (CCL), has secured a significant statewide contract. This contract entails the development of two innovative courses that aim to revolutionize the way students bridge academic knowledge with practical career applications. This initiative represents a strategic move by P2C to enhance educational experiences for students across the state and is a demonstration of their commitment to fostering career readiness.

An Important statement from the Yemeni Armed Forces will be issued at 2:40 PM ET shortly.

data.title: Levi Strauss Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co. will be announcing its first quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, April 7. Analysts are predicting earnings of 37 cents per share, a slight decrease from the 38 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The expected revenue for the quarter is $1.65 billion, up from the $1.53 billion reported in the previous year. Levi Strauss recently finalized the sale of Dockers® to Authentic Brands Group. The company's shares saw a 1.3% drop, trading at $18.75. For further insights, Benzinga Pro offers access to the latest analyst ratings through its Analyst Stock Ratings page, providing a variety of sorting options for readers. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Brand Storytelling Agency INVNT® Joins Nth Degree to Form an Unmatched Live Events Platform
data.description: Today, in Atlanta, on April 2, 2026, Nth Degree, a prominent event design and delivery company, revealed that INVNT, a global brand storytelling agency, will merge with the company. This strategic move follows an investment by private equity partner Shamrock Capital to support Nth Degree's market expansion efforts. The collaboration aims to establish a dominant presence in the live event sector, leveraging INVNT's expertise to enhance Nth Degree's offerings. This partnership is a significant step towards consolidating their position in the industry, driving growth and innovation.

data.title: Stewart Valuation Intelligence Acquires Nationwide Appraisal Network
data.description: Houston-based Stewart Valuation Intelligence (SVI) under Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE: STC) has acquired Nationwide Appraisal Network, LLC (NAN), a well-known appraisal management company with over 20 years of experience in the industry. This acquisition aims to bolster SVI's appraisal capabilities and talent pool, as mentioned by Stewart CEO Fred Eppinger. NAN's expertise will further enhance SVI's services.

data.title: Root Canal vs. Filling: Bryant Arkansas Dental Expert Alex Hamilton Explains When Each Treatment Is Needed in HelloNation
data.description: In a recent article on HelloNation, the process of tooth decay advancement and the criteria for dentists to suggest either a filling or a root canal are detailed. Published on April 2, 2026, in Bryant, Arkansas, the article examines the differentiation between a minor toothache and indications of a more severe dental issue. The piece offers insights into identifying the severity of tooth pain, guiding readers on when to seek professional dental intervention.

data.title: Agrace Expands to Serve Southeastern Wisconsin
data.description: In an announcement made on April 2, 2026, Agrace, a prominent nonprofit hospice organization headquartered in Wisconsin, has broadened its services to cover the entirety of the southern region of the state. This expansion includes the incorporation of Ozaukee, Washington, Racine, and Kenosha counties into Agrace's service area in Milwaukee. With almost five decades of experience in providing hospice care, Agrace now caters to a larger population in Wisconsin, serving a significant number of individuals in need of their specialized services.

data.title: WeRide Expands Autonomous Driving Milestone In UAE With Uber
data.description: WeRide Inc., trading as ADR (NASDAQ: WRD), experienced an increase in their shares on Tuesday following the launch of fully driverless Robotaxi fare-charging operations in Dubai. This achievement signifies a significant milestone in the partnership between WeRide and Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER). Uber has recently disclosed its ownership of about 5.82% of WeRide's Class A ordinary shares, demonstrating a strong belief in WeRide's technological capabilities and long-term strategic value.The collaboration between WeRide and Uber led to the introduction of fully driverless Robotaxi service in Dubai, making it the inaugural batch of Level 4 Robotaxis to be deployed for commercial service in the city. This initiative comes after the triumphant trial service that commenced in December 2025. The surge in WeRide's stock prices today is predominantly driven by this groundbreaking development.

data.title: Shake Shack Turnaround: Analyst Says Strategy Can Beef Up Margins
data.description: Shake Shack, Inc. saw a rise in its stock price on Tuesday following an upgrade from BofA Securities analyst Sara Senatore. The stock, listed as SHAK on NYSE, was upgraded from Underperform to Neutral, with the price target increased from $88 to $101. Senatore highlighted the company's efforts to combat economic challenges by diversifying suppliers to offset increasing beef costs. These changes are anticipated to boost margins and sustain a medium-term net restaurant growth rate of about 15%. The introduction of new menu items like the Dubai Shake and Korean-inspired dishes has helped stabilize foot traffic in the face of industry-wide declines. Targeted marketing towards younger customers has also contributed to maintaining foot traffic. Senatore pointed out that Shake Shack's supply chain strategy focuses on diversification among producers and geographies, product optimization, improved transportation logistics, and technology integration to address cost pressures effectively.

data.title: Gemma 4 revives Google in the open-source AI game with a $31B model, ranking third globally. Offered in four sizes under Apache 2.0 license.
data.description: Ranked at third place globally among all open-weight models, the 31B model stands out with its Apache 2.0 licensing and a range of four sizes catering from phones to workstations. The US open-source community, in particular, was eager for a success story, making this achievement all the more significant.

data.title: Books-A-Million Celebrates Associate Creativity and Announces Winners of Fourth Annual Round Up For Writers Contest; Customers Help Raise More Than $200,000 for Poets & Writers
data.description: In Birmingham, Alabama on April 2, 2026, Books-A-Million™ revealed the names of the five winners of its fourth-round Round Up For Writers competition. This contest, held annually, aims to recognize the creative skills of its store associates. Books-A-Million™, the US's second-largest bookstore retailer, organized this competition to acknowledge the talent within its network.

data.title: The Only Mach 2+ Commercial Fleet in the World Is Now Testing Reusable Hypersonic Space Systems -- and the Pentagon Is Writing the Checks
data.description: A news commentary released on April 2, 2026, from Starfighters Space, Inc. in CAPE CANAVERAL, Fla. highlighted the emerging arms race taking place in the stratosphere at 45,000 feet and Mach 2 speeds. This new battleground for hypersonic weapons showcases the shift from traditional ground-based warfare.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Greenbrier Expectations Ahead Of Q2 Earnings
data.description: Greenbrier Companies, Inc. (NYSE: GBX) is set to reveal its second-quarter earnings after the market closes on Tuesday, April 7. Analysts are predicting earnings of 82 cents per share, a decrease from $1.69 per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus revenue estimate for the quarter is $663.67 million, lower than the $762.1 million revenue reported last year. Greenbrier recently raised its quarterly dividend from 32 cents to 34 cents per share. As of Thursday, Greenbrier's shares were trading at $52.80, showing a 0.4% increase. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Folger Consort Announces 2026-27 Season of Early Music, Celebrating 50 Years of Musical Excellence
data.description: In 2026, the program commemorates the legacy of Folger Consort and its co-artistic directors, Robert Eisenstein and Christopher Kendall. Based in Washington, the renowned early music ensemble-in-residence at the Folger Shakespeare Library is being celebrated.

data.title: Lucid Reveals 2027 Gravity Lineup with Expanded Standard Features
data.description: Lucid has unveiled the latest 2027 Lucid Gravity series, which includes a range of enhanced standard features, streamlined packaging options, and improved daily usability across all versions. The Grand Touring model has received significant new standard amenities and introduces the exclusive Prestige Package - a premium package offering a combination of 22"/23" wheels and other luxury upgrades.

data.title: Aehr Test Systems Gears Up For Q3 Print; Here Are The Recent Forecast Changes From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
data.description: Aehr Test Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: AEHR) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, April 7, after market close. Analysts are predicting a quarterly loss of 7 cents per share, a decrease from the 7 cents per share profit reported in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for Aehr Test Systems' quarterly revenue stands at $10.85 million, a decline from the $18.31 million revenue generated last year. The company recently secured an initial order from a major player in the data center optical transceiver market. Following this news, Aehr Test Systems' stock price rose by 5.9% to reach $41.95 on Thursday. For more detailed information on analyst ratings, readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com.
